note.zh: Claude Opus 4.8(xhigh 思考档位)在 Claude Code 中用仓库标准中文提示词(仅按案例规则填写文末【本次运行】占位符)一次生成的圈地智能体,未经人工修改。按案例规则,策略文件不公开、仅注册运行,由维护者亲自执行。自命名「蚕食」。
note.en: One-shot Turf War agent by Claude Opus 4.8 (xhigh effort) in Claude Code from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt (only the [This run] placeholders filled per case rules), with no human edits. Per case rules the policy file is unpublished; this entry registers the maintainer-executed run. Self-named "蚕食".
